name: adidas Campus Prince 032c Black
story: Devised in partnership with the Berlin-based magazine turned fashion label, the 032c x adidas Campus Prince ‘Black’ delivers a monochrome take on the classic silhouette. The uniform finish on the premium leather upper is disrupted by red 032c branding stamped on the rubber heel tab. A metal piercing ring adorns the top of the lateral eyestay, securely placed with threaded detailing. A black rubber cupsole maintains the sneaker’s blacked-out aesthetic.

name: adidas Campus Prince 032c White
story: Developed in collaboration with the Berlin-based publication turned fashion label, the 032c x adidas Campus Prince ‘White’ offers a pristine colorway of the retro low-top. The sneaker’s soft leather build is entirely finished in Cloud White, save for ‘032c’ printed in red on the rubber heel tab. An additional decorative touch takes the form of a piercing ring threaded atop the lateral eyestay. Dark tan leather throughout the interior lining adds to the sneaker’s premium look and feel.

name: adidas FYW S-97 Salvation 032c
story: Made in collaboration with the Berlin-based magazine turned apparel brand, the 032c x adidas FYW S-97 Salvation ‘Cream’ updates the retro runner with a reconstructed build, highlighted by a toggle lacing system that wraps around a padded textile sheath. Breathable mesh inserts and suede overlays maintain the silhouette’s distinctive lines, while a sculpted EVA midsole offers lightweight cushioning. 032c branding is good for a contrasting pop of red on the heel tab.

name: adidas GSG Mule 032c Black
story: The 032C x adidas GSG Mule ‘Core Black’ applies a stealthy one-note finish to a slip-on silhouette that draws twin inspirations from technical sportswear and 2000s fashion design. Stretchy neoprene is utilized on the upper, accented with tonal three-stripe branding and fortified with synthetic leather overlays. The smooth surfaces up top are contrasted by a sculpted rubber tooling, enhanced with Adiprene cushioning and modeled after the adidas GSG-9 boot.

name: adidas GSG Mule 032c Savannah
story: The 032C x adidas GSG Mule ‘Savanna’ delivers a minimalist slip-on that blends inspiration from contemporary fashion and outdoor gear. The latter is embodied through utilitarian tooling borrowed from the adidas GSG-9 boot, which the Berlin-based creative group propped up as a foundational influence. Up top, beige neoprene is reinforced with a suede forefoot overly and lined in soft textile. Dual adidas and 032c branding lands on the crimson-hued sockliner.

name: adidas GSG TR 032c Hi-Res Yellow
story: Designed in partnership with the Berlin-based creative collective, the 032C x adidas GSG TR ‘Pulse Lime’ applies a monochromatic lime green finish to a lifestyle silhouette crafted from neoprene and secured with drawcord lacing. Tonal leather overlays feature a reflective finish for added visibility in low-light conditions. Mismatched tongue tags display adidas and 032c branding, with the latter logo making a repeat appearance on the lateral heel. The lightweight build is supported by rugged trail-inspired tooling borrowed from the adidas GSG-9 boot.

name: adidas GSG TR 032c Hi-Res Stone Green
100 Thieves x adidas Adilette Slide 'Black Red'
100 Thieves x adidas Palos Hills 'Silver Pebble'
adidas 350 Black Orange Yellow
story: To pay homage to Russia’s capital, adidas has released a fresh update to their classic 350 silhouette. The 350 'Moskva,' — which literally means “Moscow” — features a premium black leather upper, three orange and yellow stripes, orange detailing on the heel overlay, and a red adidas stamp on the textured tongue. The model also boasts “Moskva” lettering on the side panels and a classic white 350 midsole.

name: adidas 350 White Scarlet Orange
story: Putting a spin on a classic silhouette, adidas released a 350 inspired by Moscow, the capital of Russia. The 350 'Moskva,' — which literally means “Moscow” — comes in two colorways. This one features a premium white leather upper with three orange and red stripes, red detailing on the heel overlay, and a red adidas stamp on the tongue. “Moskva” lettering is additionally included on the side panels in a metallic gold color, atop a classic white 350 midsole.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Grey
story: The 3M x adidas Nite Jogger ‘3M Logo Print’ delivers a modern interpretation of the footwear industry’s first reflective running shoe, originally released in 1980 to provide added visibility during nighttime runs. In addition to reflective thread woven into the laces, the sneaker’s Metal Grey leather upper is covered in a reflective silver print made up of the 3M Scotchlite logo. A full-length Boost midsole maintains the monochromatic design.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Red
story: The 3M x adidas Nite Jogger ‘3M Logo Print’ features a bold design made to turn heads. In addition to the monochromatic finish in Hi-Res Red, the leather upper is further enlivened with reflective silver metallic accents. They appear on the heel tab, three-stripes and laces, as well as an all-over print made up of the 3M Scotchlite logo. The same crimson hue up top makes a repeat appearance on the full-length Boost midsole.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Collegiate Burgundy
story: The adidas Nite Jogger returns upgraded with 3M Scotchlite capability. Launched in October 2019, this edition borrows authentic details from the 80s precursor with a combination of burgundy nylon, mesh and suede. Three-Stripes remain on the sides and light-catching elements are seen throughout. An enlarged logo graphic spans the medial side. Its responsive Boost midsole and tricolor rubber outsole keep the sneaker modern.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Core Black
story: The 3M x adidas Nite Jogger builds upon the classic sneaker's legacy by infusing it with modern tech amenities. Arrived in October 2019, this rendition wears a Core Black mesh and nylon upper with suede panels, neon lining and a molded TPU heel clip. A large logo graphic to the medial calls out the reflective elements throughout. The sneaker follows usual form with an energetic Boost midsole and rubber outsole.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M White
story: Introduced during the running boom in the early 80s, the adidas Nite Jogger was the brand's first sneaker engineered for after-dark activity. This modern version—issued in July 2019—updates the formula with hits of 3M Scotchlite reflective elements on a white mesh upper with tonal suede overlays. The Three-Stripes emblem is stitched on the sides. A full-length Boost midsole and rubber outsole give the shoe energy and traction.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Core Black Crystal White
story: The 3M x adidas Nite Jogger honors the classic's past while reaching for the future with updated technology and modern elements. Debuted in October 2019, this version boasts a Crystal White mesh, nylon and suede upper with lateral Three-Stripes and a blown-up logo graphic across the medial side. Reflective laces and detailing add a light-catching flash. The sneaker rides a responsive Boost midsole and rubber outsole.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Cloud White
story: The 3M x adidas Nite Jogger matches retro details from the 1980 style with modern functionality. Updated in October 2019, this Footwear White release boasts high-visibility elements and suede panels on the nylon and mesh upper. The sneaker is styled with fused Three-Stripes, a raw-edge tongue and oversized logo graphic across the medial. Boost technology and a matching rubber outsole supply impact protection and stability.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Navy
story: 3M teamed up to makeover the adidas Nite Jogger in this 'Collegiate Navy' rendition, offered in July 2019. The shoe's archival runner-inspired silhouette begins with a mesh upper and adds suede overlays for a premium feel. 3M Scotchlite reflective material highlights the toe box, laces and heel to help improve visibility for late-night runs. A blacked-out Boost midsole adds a plush, responsive feel.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Core Black Carbon (Women's)
story: The 3M x adidas Wmns Nite Jogger brings together authentic elements from the 80s template with modern street cues. Debuted in October 2019, this Carbon women's iteration mixes high-visibility detailing into the nylon, mesh and leather upper. The sneaker stays modern with fused Three-Stripes, a Morse code tongue label and enlarged logo on the medial. A Boost midsole for energy return and tricolor rubber outsole offer support.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Raw White (Women's)
story: Based on the 1980 precursor, adidas reworks the Wmns Nite Jogger with 3M Scotchlite technology. This women's version—issued in October 2019—has reflective and leather details across its Raw White mesh and nylon upper. An oversized logo on the medial, Morse code tongue label and fused Three-Stripes add a technical finish. The sneaker is built on responsive Boost midsole cushioning and a durable rubber outsole with a pop of neon.

name: adidas Nite Jogger 3M Vapour Pink (Women's)
story: The 3M x adidas Wmns Nite Jogger is the German brand’s first reflective runner reborn for the modern streets. Unveiled in October 2019, this women's variant in Vapour Pink is dressed in nylon and mesh detailed with light-catching elements and tumbled leather panels. Modern tweaks include a Morse code graphic on the tongue, molded TPU heel clip and fused Three-Stripes. A Boost midsole and tricolor rubber outsole provide cushioned support.

name: adidas 3MC Tie-Dye Purple
story: The adidas 3MC ‘Purple Tint Tie-Dye’ applies a vibrant psychedelic print to a durable canvas upper, accented with stitched three-stripe detailing and a suede heel tab. The low-top rides on a contrasting white rubber midsole with textured sidewalls — a detail borrowed from the adidas Gazelle. Underfoot, the vulcanized HexFlex rubber outsole delivers improved flexibility by accommodating the natural movement of the foot.

name: adidas 3MC Tech Purple
colorway: Tech Purple / Tech Purple / Tech Purple
story: The adidas 3MC ‘Tech Purple’ gives the versatile low-top a monochromatic makeover that’s executed on both the upper and tooling. The durable canvas build is accented with stitched three-stripe detailing and a leather heel tab with tonal adidas Trefoil branding. A padded collar offers a comfortable fit, while eyelets on the medial-side quarter panel provides added breathability. The rubber outsole features a hexagonal traction that delivers optimal grip.

name: adidas 3MC Vulc Cloud White
story: While adidas’ 3MC Vulc is made for skating, the low-profile shoe is equally at home on the street. Its versatility is enhanced with this all-white colorway, featuring a reinforced canvas upper complemented by raised tonal three-stripes. On the quarter panel is a Seeley-inspired logo tab, while the textured midsole and heel mustache is borrowed from the Gazelle. Underneath it all, a Geoflex outsole delivers optimal board feel.

name: adidas 3MC Vulc Collegiate Navy
story: A skate ready silhouette that’s inspired by the look of heritage tennis footwear, the adidas 3MC Vulc shoes feature a Geoflex outsole that’s designed to bend and move with the foot’s motion, while creating a better board feel. Constructed with a lightweight canvas upper, these sneakers also feature a tonal Three-Stripes branding on the side panels, inspired by the look of the classic Gazelle.

name: adidas 3MC Vulc Core Black Cloud White
story: The adidas 3MC Vulc is a low-profile skate shoe that features a simple, yet technical design that’s made to excel in the streets both on and off the board. It’s primarily seamless paneling on the upper features a canvas makeup, while the Geoflex outsole is made to bend and move wherever the foot goes to provide an enhanced board feel.

name: adidas 3MC Vulc Light Solid Grey
colorway: Light Solid Grey/Light Solid Grey/Cloud White
story: Classic and functional, the adidas 3MC Vulc sneaker nods to the German sportswear brand's skateboarding heritage beginning in the 90s. This version features a Light Solid Grey canvas upper styled with matching laces, medial rivets for ventilation and stitched Three-Stripes. Minimalist branding is included on the tongue, aside the eyelets and on the leather heel tab. Its vulcanized rubber sole carries a HexFlex tread pattern.

name: adidas 3MC Vulc Raw Khaki
story: The 3MC Vulc sneaker nods to adidas' iconic skate heritage with updated functionality and a minimalist yet modern look. Arrived in May 2019, this version carries a canvas upper in Raw Khaki, the Three-Stripes emblem stitched to the sides and tonal laces. Signature logos stand out in contrast on the tongue and leather heel badge. Flexibility is improved with a HexFlex tread design on the vulcanized rubber sole.

name: adidas 3ST.003 Core Black
story: A 2018 addition to the 3ST collection from adidas Skateboarding, the 3ST.003 exemplifies the brand’s new, modern approach to the skate shoe. The design, seen here in a classic ‘Core Black’ colorway, is made from a durable, reinforced suede in the forefoot and features a fold-down tongue and structured mesh heel. Durability features include a heavily textured sidewall wrap, Adituff toe reinforcement, and a Geoflex herringbone outsole.

name: adidas 3ST.003 Miles Silvas
story: adidas Skateboarding’s 3ST.003 ‘Clear Blue’ features a mono-sock design for an adaptable fit, while the rest of the upper incorporates Clear Blue suede paneling on a formation that mirrors the look of a heritage soccer shoe. The translucent sidewalls reach up to the toe to help reinforce durability, while team rider Miles Silvas’ last name emerges next to the Three-Stripes branding in a gold font.

name: adidas 3ST.003 Clear Onix
story: The adidas Skateboarding 3ST.003 appears with a primarily grey suede upper that’s formed with a sock-like fit. Mesh panels line the tongue and heel for breathability while skating. The thick, white side wall is complemented with a gum application at the forefoot and instep to resist wear, and the outsole sports a mix of Geoflex and herringbone patterns.

name: adidas 3ST.004 Cloud White Core Black
story: Working from their open-source approach, adidas collaborated alongside their team skateboarder Tyshawn Jones for the February 2019 of the 3ST.004 'Cloud White' sneaker. The leather upper is accented by the silhouette’s unique curved Three-Stripes. Energy-returning Boost cushioning is reinforced by a Geoflex rubber cupsole that wraps the upper for premium stability and comfort with each step.

name: adidas 3ST.004 Collegiate Orange
story: adidas Skateboarding recruited team rider Tyshawn Jones to co-create the 3ST.004 'Collegiate Orange' sneaker as part of a three-piece pack released in February 2019. The vibrant suede upper is underscored by a leather heel overlay and curved Three-Stripes in Core Black. Underneath, Boost technology provides energy-returning cushioning while the Geoflex rubber cupsole aids in optimal grip control for a smooth ride.

name: adidas 3ST.004 Collegiate Royal
story: As part of an open-ended approach to developing their line, adidas Skateboarding joined forces with team skater Tyshawn Jones to co-develop the 3ST.004 'Collegiate Royal' sneaker. Released in February 2019, the shoe is outfitted with a bold suede upper, accented by unique curved Three-Stripes branding. Cushioned by a molded sockliner, responsive Boost midsole and rubber Geoflex cupsole, the shoe provides a comfortable, yet flexible fit.

name: adidas Ultra Boost 21 424 Arsenal
story: The 424 x Arsenal FC x adidas UltraBoost 21 ‘Black Scarlet’ is taken from a larger collection that brings together the LA-based retailer and the London football club. A monochromatic black finish is executed on the Primeknit upper, made in part with recycled Parley Ocean Plastic and accented with a 424 tongue tag in a contrasting red hue — a nod to the interior architecture of Emirates Stadium. Responsive cushioning arrives via a full-length Boost midsole, painted black and supported by a Continental rubber outsole in a secondary pop of scarlet.

name: adidas Pro Model 424 White
story: Made in collaboration with the LA-based streetwear brand, the 424 x adidas Pro Model ‘Cloud White’ delivers an elevated take on the retro silhouette. An exaggerated double-layered midsole, featuring a scratched patina on the white rubber sidewall, gives way to a herringbone rubber outsole underfoot. Up top, the white leather build is accented with a matching rubber shell toe, black three-stripes and 424 branding on the heel tab.

name: adidas Pro Model 424 Black
story: Designed in partnership with the LA-based streetwear brand, the 424 x adidas Pro Model ‘Core Black’ updates the retro silhouette with a raised double-layered midsole, finished in a subtly ‘scratched’ patina. The mid-top carries a black leather upper that’s accented with contrasting white three-stripes and a matching heel tab, marked with debossed 424 branding. The signature rubber shell toe completes the vintage aesthetic.

name: adidas SC Premiere 424 on Fairfax Black
adidas SC Premiere 424 on Fairfax Chalk White
adidas SC Premiere 424
story: Made in collaboration with the LA-based streetwear brand, the 424 x adidas SC Premiere ‘White Scarlet’ treats the retro-inspired silhouette to a minimalist makeover, stripped of the oversized adidas logo window that traditionally adorns the lateral quarter panel. The monochromatic white leather upper is disrupted by a contrasting pop of red on the 424-branded tongue tag. A matching white midsole is similarly marked with a debossed ‘424.’

name: adidas Superstar 424 Shelltoe
story: Designed in partnership with the LA-based streetwear brand, the 424 x adidas Pro Model ‘Core Black’ updates the retro silhouette with a double-layered midsole that gives the shoe a lifted look. Full-grain black leather is utilized on the upper, accented with contrasting white three-stripes and a matching heel tab stamped with 424 branding. The signature rubber shell toe completes the vintage aesthetic.

name: adidas 4D-5923 Never Made Pack Cloud White
adidas 4D Fusio Black Orange Pink
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Black Orange Pink’ spotlights the shoe’s groundbreaking 3D-printed midsole, created using an innovative process called Digital Light Synthesis. The lattice structure is reinforced with a smoky TPU wrap and finished in a gradient blend of pink and orange, contrasting colors that reappear throughout the predominantly black Primeknit upper. The futuristic tooling is accentuated with the addition of translucent tubes that form the sneaker’s eyelets and pull tab.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Black Pink Orange
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Black Pink’ showcases candy-bright accents on a lifestyle runner that blends sock-like comfort with adidas’ revolutionary 3D-printed midsole. Reflective threads are woven into the black and orange Primeknit upper, secured with a variable lacing system that includes translucent TPU tubing. A white and orange color fade effect is applied to the lattice-like 4D midsole, wrapped in a pink TPU cage for added durability and support.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Black Silver Metallic
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Black Silver Metallic’ pairs a stealthy palette with precisely tuned cushioning. The latter is achieved through the use of a 3D-printed midsole, featuring an innovative lattice structure made with a blend of light, oxygen and liquid resin. A molded TPU mudguard provides enhanced stability and support. Up top, a breathable Primeknit build combines black and grey yarns. In lieu of standard eyelets, the laces are looped through a series of translucent tubes for a secure fit.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Core Black Solar Red
adidas 4D Fusio Black Ultra Purple
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Black Ultra Purple’ treats the sneaker’s Primeknit textile upper with a color-fade effect that transitions from white to dark grey. A similar gradient design is applied to the TPU cage that wraps around the midsole, featuring a violet around the heel and a contrasting pop of yellow at the toe. The fluid finish is offset by a stark black 4D midsole, rendered in a data-informed lattice structure that’s created by blending light, oxygen and liquid resin.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Bold Blue Light Flash Yellow
adidas 4D Fusio Grey Solar Yellow
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Grey Solar Yellow’ applies a gradient finish to the sneaker’s 3D-printed midsole, partially concealed by a protective TPU wrap and formed using an innovative process that blends light, oxygen and liquid resin. The lattice structure supports an upper crafted from breathable Primeknit in a monochromatic grey finish. The form-fitting, sock-like build is enhanced with an integrated lacing system that incorporates translucent tubing for a futuristic aesthetic.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Screaming Orange
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Screaming Orange’ features a form-fitting Primeknit upper in a blend of fiery hues. An elastic collar accentuates the sock-like fit, while perforated detailing enhances the sneaker’s breathability. Decorative translucent tubing is integrated into the laces for a futuristic aesthetic. Finely tuned cushioning is provided by adidas’ revolutionary 3D-printed midsole, wrapped in a semi-translucent TPU cage for added stability and support.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Semi Frozen Yellow
story: The A Bathing Ape x Reebok Club C ‘White Camo’ showcases the pioneering streetwear brand’s interpretation of the classic ‘80s silhouette. The upper is constructed from white leather with the shooting-star BAPE STA logo rendered in alternating colors: green and purple camo on the left shoe, and red and blue camo on the right. Reebok’s Vector logo is incorporated into the BAPE STA graphic that adorns the heel tab, while the woven tongue tag displays the instantly recognizable Ape Head icon.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Sunset
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Sunset’ combines a vibrant palette with the brand’s groundbreaking 3D-printed tooling. Contrasting off-white and orange fibers make up the composition of the Primeknit textile upper, secured with an integrated lacing system that incorporates a series of translucent tubes affixed to the sneaker’s side panels. Finely tuned cushioning comes courtesy of the lattice-like 4D midsole, finished in purple and partially wrapped in an orange and pink TPU belt that extends from the toe and around the heel.

name: adidas 4D Fusio Core Black
story: The adidas 4D Fusio ‘Triple Black’ delivers a stealthy colorway of a lifestyle runner built with 3D-printed cushioning technology. The upper is crafted from black Primeknit with perforated detailing for improved breathability and sock-like cuff for a snug, secure fit. A series of translucent tubes are integrated into the lacing system, resulting in a futuristic aesthetic that complements the sneaker’s 4D midsole. Partially concealed behind a full-length rubberized cage, the lattice structure offers targeted responsiveness and support.

name: adidas 4D Run 1.0 Dash Grey Signal Coral
story: The adidas 4D Run 1.0 LTD ‘Dash Grey’ makes use of a dual-layer mesh upper in an understated neutral hue, accented with floating three-stripes in Signal Coral. A padded collar delivers a comfortable fit around the ankle, while an external heel counter in Blue Spirit helps to keep the foot locked in place. It all rides on adidas’ lattice-like 3D-printed midsole, offering precisely tuned cushioning based on 17 years of athlete data.

name: adidas 4D Run 1.0 Glory Blue Solar Red
story: The adidas 4D Run 1.0 ‘Glory Blue’ rides on the brand’s innovative 3D-printed midsole, featuring a lattice structure that offers precisely tuned cushioning based on 17 years of athlete-driven data. Up top, the Primeknit textile build is embellished with an abstract all-over print and tonal three-stripe branding. No-sew overlays deliver lightweight support, while a contoured heel clip in Solar Red keeps the back of the foot in place.

name: adidas 4D Run 1.0 Parley
story: Drawing inspiration from the city of Miami, the adidas 4D Run 1.0 LTD features a pristine Cloud White finish on the engineered mesh upper, made with Parley Ocean Plastic that uses upcycled plastic waste harvested from beach communities. A molded heel piece in Blue Spirit adds structural support, while the 4D liquid-printed midsole offers precision-tuned cushioning. A rubber outsole is good for durable traction underfoot.

name: adidas Performance 4D Run 1.0 Footwear White
story: The 4D Run 1.0 ‘White Signal Coral’ rides on adidas’ digitally printed midsole. Finished in a pale green hue, the innovative lattice-like structure draws on 17 years of athlete-driven data to deliver precision-tuned cushioning and support. Up top, the patterned Primeknit build is fortified with a padded collar and no-sew overlays at the toe and heel. A molded heel piece in Signal Coral offers added stability and a contrasting pop of color.

name: adidas 4D Run 1.0 Cloud White Signal Coral
adidas 4D Run 1.0 Green Carbon
story: The adidas 4D Run 1.0 ‘White Signature Pink’ features a performance-driven design based on technology and research. The midsole offers precision-tuned cushioning, its digitally printed lattice structure made with a blend of light, oxygen and liquid resin. The pale green finish on the 4D midsole is contrasted by a Signal Pink rubber outsole, featuring a traction pattern configured with computer-generated data. Up top, a metallic silver accents distinguish the one-piece textile build.

name: adidas 4D Run 1.0 Core Black Cloud White
story: The adidas 4D Runner 1.0 ‘Core Black’ brings together street-ready styling with performance running technology. A neutral grey Primeknit upper is accented with floating white three-stripes and a dotted all-over print in black. Metallic gold adidas branding adorns the tongue and lateral heel. The lightweight build sits atop adidas’ 3D-printed midsole, its lattice-like structure offering tuned cushioning based on 17 years of athlete data.

name: adidas 4D Run 1.0 Superstar White Black
story: The 4D Runner 1.0 ‘Footwear White’ showcases a color scheme inspired by the adidas Superstar, highlighted by a white mesh upper with metallic gold branding hits and contrasting black accents on the heel counter and signature three-stripes. The minimalist build rides on adidas’ groundbreaking 3D-printed midsole, featuring a unique lattice-like structure that delivers precisely targeted cushioning based on 17 years of athlete-driven data.

name: adidas 4DFWD 2 Core Black Cloud White Carbon
